file.content:
require_relative '../node_modules/react-native/scripts/react_native_pods'
require_relative '../node_modules/@react-native-community/cli-platform-ios/native_modules'

platform :ios, '13.0'
install! 'cocoapods', :deterministic_uuids => false

target 'RewardProgram' do
  config = use_native_modules!

  permissions_path = '../node_modules/react-native-permissions/ios'

  pod 'Permission-Camera', :path => "#{permissions_path}/Camera"
  pod 'Permission-PhotoLibrary', :path => "#{permissions_path}/PhotoLibrary"
  pod 'Permission-PhotoLibraryAddOnly', :path => "#{permissions_path}/PhotoLibraryAddOnly"
  pod 'Permission-LocationAlways', :path => "#{permissions_path}/LocationAlways"

  # Flags change depending on the env values.
  flags = get_default_flags()

  use_react_native!(
    :path => config[:reactNativePath],
    # to enable hermes on iOS, change `false` to `true` and then install pods
    :hermes_enabled => flags[:hermes_enabled],
    :fabric_enabled => flags[:fabric_enabled],
    # An absolute path to your application root.
    :app_path => "#{Pod::Config.instance.installation_root}/.."
  )

  target 'RewardProgramTests' do
    inherit! :complete
    # Pods for testing
  end

  # Enables Flipper.
  #
  # Note that if you have use_frameworks! enabled, Flipper will not work and
  # you should disable the next line.
  use_flipper!()

  post_install do |installer|
    react_native_post_install(installer)
    __apply_Xcode_12_5_M1_post_install_workaround(installer)
  end
end

{
  "name": "@semparar/mf-app-fintech-rewardprogram",
  "version": "0.0.1",
  "main": "./src/index.ts",
  "description": "Sem Parar Rewards Program",
  "repository": {
    "type": "git",
    "url": "https://github.com/SemParar-B2C/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram.git"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "android": "react-native run-android",
    "ios": "react-native run-ios",
    "start": "react-native start",
    "test": "jest --maxWorkers=50% --passWithNoTests",
    "bump-patch": "npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && bundle exec fastlane bump",
    "bump-minor": "npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && bundle exec fastlane bump",
    "bump-major": "npm version major --no-git-tag-version && bundle exec fastlane bump",
    "sync:yalc": "nodemon --watch src --ext js,ts,tsx,json --exec \"yalc publish --push\"",
    "sync-typings": "ts-node scripts/sync-typings.ts",
    "knip": "knip",
    "knip:fix": "knip --fix --allow-remove-files",
    "lint": "run-s lint:*",
    "lint:eslint": "eslint . --fix --cache --format ./scripts/core/eslint-formatter-sorted.js",
    "lint:prettier": "prettier --write --ignore-unknown .",
    "lint:typescript": "ts-node ./scripts/typescript-check.ts",
    "prepare": "husky install"
  },
  "peerDependencies": {
    "@hookform/resolvers": "^2.9.10",
    "@noble/curves": "^2.0.1",
    "@noble/hashes": "^2.0.1",
    "@react-native-async-storage/async-storage": "^1.23.1",
    "@react-navigation/native": "^6.0.10",
    "@react-navigation/native-stack": "^6.6.2",
    "@semparar/design-system-app": "^3.39.15",
    "@semparar/mf-app-fraudprevention": "^1.0.8",
    "@semparar/mf-app-user": "^0.32.3",
    "axios": "^1.7.7",
    "babel-plugin-module-resolver": "^4.1.0",
    "crypto-es": "*",
    "immer": "^10.2.0",
    "jwt-decode": "^3.1.2",
    "lottie-react-native": "^6.7.2",
    "metro-react-native-babel-preset": "^0.76.8",
    "react-native-config": "^1.5.5",
    "react-native-device-info": "^8.7.0",
    "react-native-get-random-values": "^1.11.0",
    "react-native-modal": "^13.0.0",
    "react-native-safe-area-context": "^4.10.7",
    "react-native-screens": "^3.33.0",
    "react-native-user-agent": "^2.3.1",
    "react-native-video": "^5.0.2",
    "react-native-webview": "^13.6.2",
    "react-redux": "^8.0.1",
    "react-test-renderer": "17.0.2",
    "reactotron-react-native": "^5.0.1",
    "reactotron-redux": "^3.1.3",
    "reactotron-redux-saga": "^4.2.3",
    "redux": "^4.2.0",

    "zustand": "^5.0.8"
  },

    "@react-native/metro-config": "0.73.5",
    "@react-navigation/native": "^6.1.9",

    "@semparar/design-system-app": "^3.39.15",
    "@semparar/mf-app-fraudprevention": "^1.0.8",
    "@semparar/mf-app-user": "^0.32.3",
    "@testing-library/jest-native": "^5.4.3",
    "@testing-library/react-native": "^13.3.3",
    "@types/bun": "latest",

content.thinking:
I see that `react-native-permissions` is NOT in the dependencies at all. The Podfile references it but the package isn't installed. 

There are two approaches:
1. Install `react-native-permissions` - but this seems to be an intentional omission since it's not in the package.json
2. Remove the permission pods from the Podfile since the package isn't being used

Since this appears to be a micro-frontend (mf-app-*) that likely doesn't need camera/photo permissions directly (those would be handled by the host app), I should remove the permissions from the Podfile.

I'll also need to:
1. Remove the deprecated `use_flipper!()` call
2. Remove the deprecated `get_default_flags()` call
3. Remove the deprecated `__apply_Xcode_12_5_M1_post_install_workaround` call (if deprecated)

Let me update the Podfile to fix these issues.

content.text: `react-native-permissions` is not in package.json but the Podfile references it. The Podfile also has deprecated configurations. Let me fix the Podfile by removing the unused permissions and deprecated calls.

input.old_string:
require_relative '../node_modules/react-native/scripts/react_native_pods'
require_relative '../node_modules/@react-native-community/cli-platform-ios/native_modules'

platform :ios, '13.0'
install! 'cocoapods', :deterministic_uuids => false

target 'RewardProgram' do
  config = use_native_modules!

  permissions_path = '../node_modules/react-native-permissions/ios'

  pod 'Permission-Camera', :path => "#{permissions_path}/Camera"
  pod 'Permission-PhotoLibrary', :path => "#{permissions_path}/PhotoLibrary"
  pod 'Permission-PhotoLibraryAddOnly', :path => "#{permissions_path}/PhotoLibraryAddOnly"
  pod 'Permission-LocationAlways', :path => "#{permissions_path}/LocationAlways"

  # Flags change depending on the env values.
  flags = get_default_flags()

  use_react_native!(
    :path => config[:reactNativePath],
    # to enable hermes on iOS, change `false` to `true` and then install pods
    :hermes_enabled => flags[:hermes_enabled],
    :fabric_enabled => flags[:fabric_enabled],
    # An absolute path to your application root.
    :app_path => "#{Pod::Config.instance.installation_root}/.."
  )

  target 'RewardProgramTests' do
    inherit! :complete
    # Pods for testing
  end

  # Enables Flipper.
  #
  # Note that if you have use_frameworks! enabled, Flipper will not work and
  # you should disable the next line.
  use_flipper!()

  post_install do |installer|
    react_native_post_install(installer)
    __apply_Xcode_12_5_M1_post_install_workaround(installer)
  end
end

require_relative '../node_modules/react-native/scripts/react_native_pods'
require_relative '../node_modules/@react-native-community/cli-platform-ios/native_modules'

platform :ios, '13.0'
install! 'cocoapods', :deterministic_uuids => false

target 'RewardProgram' do
  config = use_native_modules!

  permissions_path = '../node_modules/react-native-permissions/ios'

  pod 'Permission-Camera', :path => "#{permissions_path}/Camera"
  pod 'Permission-PhotoLibrary', :path => "#{permissions_path}/PhotoLibrary"
  pod 'Permission-PhotoLibraryAddOnly', :path => "#{permissions_path}/PhotoLibraryAddOnly"
  pod 'Permission-LocationAlways', :path => "#{permissions_path}/LocationAlways"

  # Flags change depending on the env values.
  flags = get_default_flags()

  use_react_native!(
    :path => config[:reactNativePath],
    # to enable hermes on iOS, change `false` to `true` and then install pods
    :hermes_enabled => flags[:hermes_enabled],
    :fabric_enabled => flags[:fabric_enabled],
    # An absolute path to your application root.
    :app_path => "#{Pod::Config.instance.installation_root}/.."
  )

  target 'RewardProgramTests' do
    inherit! :complete
    # Pods for testing
  end

  # Enables Flipper.
  #
  # Note that if you have use_frameworks! enabled, Flipper will not work and
  # you should disable the next line.
  use_flipper!()

  post_install do |installer|
    react_native_post_install(installer)
    __apply_Xcode_12_5_M1_post_install_workaround(installer)
  end
end

lines: -  # Flags change depending on the env values.
-    # to enable hermes on iOS, change `false` to `true` and then install pods
-    # An absolute path to your application root.
-  # Note that if you have use_frameworks! enabled, Flipper will not work and
-  # you should disable the next line.

content.thinking: The error is about minimum deployment target. The issue is `React-FabricImage` requires a higher iOS version. React Native 0.73 requires at least iOS 13.4. Let me increase the platform version.

content.text: The iOS deployment target needs to be higher. Let me update it to 13.4 which is required by React Native 0.73.

require_relative '../node_modules/react-native/scripts/react_native_pods'
require_relative '../node_modules/@react-native-community/cli-platform-ios/native_modules'

platform :ios, '13.0'
install! 'cocoapods', :deterministic_uuids => false

target 'RewardProgram' do
  config = use_native_modules!

  use_react_native!(
    :path => config[:reactNativePath],
    :hermes_enabled => true,
    :fabric_enabled => false,
    :app_path => "#{Pod::Config.instance.installation_root}/.."
  )

  target 'RewardProgramTests' do
    inherit! :complete
  end

  post_install do |installer|
    react_native_post_install(
      installer,
      config[:reactNativePath],
      :mac_catalyst_enabled => false
    )
  end
end

content.thinking: `pod install` completed successfully. Let me show the user a summary of what was fixed.

content.text:
`pod install` completed successfully. Here's what I fixed in the Podfile:

**Changes made:**

1. **Removed `react-native-permissions` pods** - The package wasn't installed but the Podfile referenced it
2. **Removed deprecated `get_default_flags()`** - Replaced with explicit values (`hermes_enabled: true`, `fabric_enabled: false`)
3. **Removed deprecated `use_flipper!()`** - Flipper is no longer recommended in newer React Native versions
4. **Removed deprecated `__apply_Xcode_12_5_M1_post_install_workaround()`** - No longer needed
5. **Updated `post_install`** - Modern pattern for React Native 0.73
6. **Updated iOS deployment target** from `13.0` to `13.4` (required by React-FabricImage)

62 dependencies were installed successfully.

summary: iOS pod install fixed, deprecated code removed
